SignalSrc.Name: Device1.POWER_SUPPLY
SignalSrc.Description: PCI card Rack1INOUT Port : 3 And Line : 0

SignalSrc.Name: Device1.ParkingBreak
SignalSrc.Description: PCI card Rack1INOUT Port : 3 And Line : 1

SignalSrc.Name: Device1.Windscreen_Fluid_Level
SignalSrc.Description: PCI card Rack1INOUT Port : 3 And Line : 2

SignalSrc.Name: Device1.Brake_Fluid_Level
SignalSrc.Description: PCI card Rack1INOUT Port : 3 And Line : 3

SignalSrc.Name: Device1.Strg_Wheel_SW1
SignalSrc.Description: PCI card Rack1OUT Port : 3 And Line : 0

SignalSrc.Name: Device1.Ignition
SignalSrc.Description: PCI card Rack1OUT Port : 3 And Line : 1

SignalSrc.Name: Device1.Oil_Pressure
SignalSrc.Description: PCI card Rack1OUT Port : 3 And Line : 2

SignalSrc.Name: Clim_Room_SW
SignalSrc.Description: Card02 Do bool(Out) Port : 0 And Line : 5-7

SignalSrc.Name: Sleep_mode
SignalSrc.Description: Card02 Do bool(Out) Port : 1 And Line : 7
